name: Vegetable Mustard Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop or grind the carrots to measure 1 cup.
2. Peel and seed the cucumber, then finely chop or grind it to measure 1/2 cup, pressing out all liquid.
3. Finely chop the green pepper to measure 1/2 cup, pressing out any excess liquid.
4. Finely chop the onions to measure 1/2 cup, pressing out any liquid.
5. Combine the chopped vegetables in a saucepan.
6. Add vinegar, mustard, and seasonings (salt, celery seed, and ground ginger) to the vegetable mixture.
7. Measure the sugar separately.
8. Mix the fruit pectin into the vegetable mixture in the saucepan.
9. Place over high heat and stir until the mixture comes to a full boil.
10. Add all the sugar to the boiling mixture and stir well.
11. Continue boiling for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
12. Remove from heat and skim off any foam with a metal spoon.
13. Quickly ladle the hot relish into sterilized jars, filling them up to within 1/8 inch of the top.
14. Wipe the rim of each jar and cover with a sterilized two-piece lid.
15. Secure the screw bands tightly.
16. Invert the jars for 5 minutes, then turn them upright.
17. Check the seals after 1 hour.
Makes: 4 (1/2 pint) jars.
